records.ety: [LL. camelopardus, L. camelopardalus, camelopardalis, fr. Gr. kamhlopa`rdalis; ka`mhlos a camel + pa`rdalis pard, leopard: cf. F. camlopard. The camelopard has a neck and head like a camel, and is spotted like a pard. See Camel, and Pard.]

defs: An African ruminant; the giraffe. See Giraffe.
